commitMessage:
fix(desktop+mobile): show all events in desktop grid and make About content scrollable on mobile

Desktop (>=1024px):
- Remove hard cap of 6 items in Events grid so all events are accessible via scroll
- Add containment (contain: paint, isolation: isolate) and compositor hints on hero and grid containers to further eliminate flicker

Mobile About (<=767px):
- Make About content section independently scrollable with comfortable max height (min(56vh, 460px)) to keep Gallery visible
- Preserve glassmorphism, spacing, and smooth touch scrolling

No visual or behavioral changes beyond the fixes.
